ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the company was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., Limited, Public, Private) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number for the company */,
  "registered_address" TEXT /* Address where the company is registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is registered */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "tax_identification_number" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the company */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the company record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the company record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the company record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the individual record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the individual record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the individual record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the individual record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Shareholder, Director) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed responsibilities of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the role record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the role record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_individuals" (
  "company_id" TEXT /* ID of the company */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the individual has within the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the individual started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the individual ended in the role (if applicable) */,
  "percentage_ownership" TEXT /* Percentage of ownership for shareholders */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the relationship record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the relationship record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "individual_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual who is the shareholder */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* ID of the company in which the individual has shares */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned by the individual */,
  "percentage_ownership" TEXT /* Percentage of ownership for the shareholder */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the shareholder record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shareholder record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the shareholder record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shareholder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholders_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual who is the director */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* ID of the company in which the individual is a director */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the individual was appointed as a director */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the individual's appointment ended (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the director record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the director record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the director record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the director record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal representative */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual who is the legal representative */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* ID of the company in which the individual is a legal representative */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the individual was appointed as a legal representative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the individual's appointment ended (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the legal representative record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the legal representative record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the legal representative record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the legal representative record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_representatives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_representatives_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judicial_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judicial representative */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual who is the judicial representative */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* ID of the company in which the individual is a judicial representative */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the individual was appointed as a judicial representative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the individual's appointment ended (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the judicial representative record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the judicial representative record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the judicial representative record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the judicial representative record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judicial_representatives_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judicial_representatives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
